value.found_quote: Claude also builds auto memory as it works, saving learnings like build commands and debugging insights across sessions without you writing anything.
value.rationale: The claim's specific framing (Claude Managed Agents, Scout Memory, public beta, Claude Console) does not appear on the page. However, the core offering — Claude Code memory, i.e. persistent memory across sessions — is clearly described via the "auto memory" feature and CLAUDE.md persistent instructions. The page substantiates that Claude Code offers memory that persists across sessions, presented as a current feature.
